evals.prompt: Bir yüksek lisans öğrencim "sanal prodüksiyonun sinemada kullanımı" üzerine doktora yapmak istiyor. YÖK Ulusal Tez Merkezi'nde daha önce benzer bir tez yapılmış mı, danışman olarak onaylamadan önce kontrol eder misin?
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-yok-tez in originality-check mode: builds paired Turkish AND English Detaylı Tarama queries across Konu/Tez Adı/Özet (subject_headings, thesis_title, abstract_text), constrains thesis_type to Doktora, and CRUCIALLY sets permission_status to Tümü (All) so İzinsiz (restricted, abstract-only) theses still surface as prior art. Runs them via the saidsurucu/yoktez-mcp search_yok_tez_detailed tool, merges and dedupes on Tez No, and returns a newest-first table of {Tez No, year, university, danışman, title, izin}. States explicitly that this is registry/prior-art coverage, not a plagiarism or text-similarity score.

assertions.value: Sets permission_status=Tümü so restricted (İzinsiz) theses surface, runs both a Turkish and an English query, and frames the result as registry prior-art coverage rather than an originality/plagiarism verdict.

evals.prompt: I need every doctoral dissertation supervised by Prof. Ayşe Yılmaz at İzmir Ekonomi Üniversitesi for a department report. Can you pull them from the national thesis center?
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-yok-tez for advisor-based discovery: queries YÖK Ulusal Tez Merkezi via search_yok_tez_detailed with advisor_name (Danışman) set to the supervisor, university_name set to the institution, and thesis_type Doktora. Handles Turkish-name diacritic variants when matching, and returns the deduplicated thesis list with Tez No, title, year, and permission status.

assertions.value: Searches by advisor_name (danışman) + university on YÖK Ulusal Tez Merkezi and returns the supervised-thesis list, accounting for Turkish diacritic variants in the name.

evals.prompt: Bu YÖK tezini kaynakçama ekleyeceğim, Türkçe APA 7'ye göre nasıl atıf yaparım? Yılmaz, A. (2021), Sanal prodüksiyonun sinematografiye etkileri, Doktora tezi, İzmir Ekonomi Üniversitesi, Tez No 654321, izinli.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-yok-tez in citation mode: formats a Türkçe APA-7 thesis reference, mapping the YÖK Tez No (654321) to APA's Yayın No., producing 'Yılmaz, A. (2021). Sanal prodüksiyonun sinematografiye etkileri (Yayın No. 654321) [Doktora tezi, İzmir Ekonomi Üniversitesi]. YÖK Ulusal Tez Merkezi.' Optionally emits a matching BibTeX @phdthesis with note={YÖK Ulusal Tez Merkezi, Tez No. 654321}. Distinguishes the published/İzinli template from the unpublished/İzinsiz one.

assertions.value: Maps the YÖK Tez No to APA Yayın No. and uses the published (İzinli) thesis template, italic title, [Doktora tezi, Üniversite], archive 'YÖK Ulusal Tez Merkezi'.

evals.prompt: I'm writing a literature review and want to find existing Turkish master's and doctoral theses on sustainable architecture. Search the national thesis repository and give me what's there.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-yok-tez for topic literature discovery: builds paired Turkish (e.g. 'sürdürülebilir mimari', using the root form for auto-stemming) and English ('sustainable architecture') queries across Konu/Tez Adı/Özet, runs them through search_yok_tez_detailed, and returns a deduplicated thesis list. Notes the 2000-results-per-search cap and the split-by-year/university workaround if the topic is broad.

assertions.value: Runs both Turkish (root-form) and English queries across subject/title/abstract fields and warns about the 2000-result-per-search cap for broad topics.

evals.prompt: Sürdürülebilir mimari üzerine Türkçe dergi makaleleri arıyorum. DergiPark'tan bu konuda yayımlanmış makaleleri bulabilir misin?
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-dergipark. The user wants Turkish journal ARTICLES from DergiPark, not graduate theses. alterlab-yok-tez only searches YÖK Ulusal Tez Merkezi (yüksek lisans/doktora theses); journal-article search and harvesting on DergiPark is alterlab-dergipark's job.

evals.prompt: My PhD student finished a rough draft of her methodology chapter and we have her viva in two months. Can you give chapter-level feedback and help us prep for the defense?
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-thesis-supervisor. The user wants hands-on thesis writing and defense/viva coaching (chapter feedback, committee prep), not a search of the national thesis registry. alterlab-yok-tez only does thesis discovery, originality checks, and citation against YÖK Ulusal Tez Merkezi; supervising the writing and defense is alterlab-thesis-supervisor's job.
